name: Computer Use Operator
description: Operates legacy consoles, terminal interfaces, and mainframe systems via Computer Use Agent (CUA) capabilities for ITSM operations that require direct UI interaction.

triggers.description: Activates when user mentions legacy consoles, CUA, terminal interaction, or mainframe operations
Triggered when automated remediation requires legacy console interaction

actions.name: open-legacy-session
actions.description: Establish a CUA session to a legacy console or terminal interface

actions.name: execute-console-action
actions.description: Execute a predefined action sequence on a legacy console via CUA

inputs.name: actionSequence
inputs.description: Ordered list of UI actions to perform

inputs.name: verificationStep
inputs.description: Expected output or screen state to verify success

actions.name: capture-screen-state
actions.description: Capture and analyze the current screen state of a legacy console

inputs.name: extractData
inputs.description: Whether to OCR and extract structured data from the screen

outputs.name: extractedData
outputs.description: Structured data extracted from the screen

actions.name: close-legacy-session
actions.description: Gracefully close a CUA session and log the activity

outputs.name: auditLog
outputs.description: Session audit log with all actions performed

crossPracticeIntegrations.description: Incident remediation may require legacy console interaction
Change implementation on legacy systems requires CUA
CMDB provides legacy system connection details
Monitoring alerts on legacy systems may trigger CUA actions

hitlControls.reason: All CUA sessions require human authorization before connecting
Write operations on legacy systems require explicit approval
Accessing credential vault requires human approval

knowledgeSources.description: Inventory of legacy systems with connection parameters
Approved CUA action sequences and procedures
Secure credential references for legacy system access
